_meta.description: Dam profile for Canuhandleajandal — reused across all her progeny listings.

description: Canuhandleajandal (NZ) is a well-bred mare from Family 22 who has proven herself as a quality producer at stud. Her progeny have attracted significant commercial interest, with her 2024 Super Seth filly selling for $260,000 at the 2026 National Yearling Sales to Wexford Stables — a strong endorsement from one of New Zealand's premier training operations. Bred by the Goldeye Trust, Canuhandleajandal is by Per Incanto (USA), a stallion known for producing tough, versatile performers. Her pedigree combines speed and stamina influences that complement the Deep Impact sire line of Satono Aladdin, giving her progeny a well-balanced genetic profile suited to both sprinting and middle-distance racing.
breeding_record: Dam of multiple foals including I Stole A Manolo (NZ) 2023 by Satono Aladdin, a 2024 Super Seth filly ($260,000 yearling sale), and a 2025 Ardrossan colt.
